OR 02-7 71-6 length 2

Left longest: 2
Right longest: 7

Left winner: I none, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT win
Right winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR lost, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: OR-NOT 01-0n 12-1n
Longest Right: I 0-7 7-6 6-5 5-4 4-3 3-2 2-1

7 + 2 = 9 > 8
Left will be truncated to length 8 - 7 = 1

Truncated left: OR-NOT 01-0n truncated
Truncated right: I 0-7 7-6 6-5 5-4 4-3 3-2 2-1

0 OR-NOT 01n

Preferred from left
0 OR-NOT 01n
1 I 2
2 I 3
3 I 4
4 I 5
5 I 6
6 I 7
7 I 0

Matched
0 OR-NOT 01n
1 I 2
2 I 3
3 I 4
4 I 5
5 I 6
6 I 7
7 I 0

Applying to 01110100
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 OR-NOT 01n = NOT(OR-NOT 01) = NOT(OR(I 0,I 1n)) = NOT(OR(I 0,NOT(I 1))) = NOT(OR(0,NOT(1))) = NOT(OR(0,0)) = NOT(0) = 1
1 I 2 = 1
2 I 3 = 1
3 I 4 = 0
4 I 5 = 1
5 I 6 = 0
6 I 7 = 0
7 I 0 = 0

\boxed{11101000}
